Class BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub

java.lang.Object
io.grpc.stub.AbstractStub<BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub>
io.grpc.stub.AbstractFutureStub<BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub>
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub
Enclosing class:
BotLiveServiceGrpc
public static final class BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub extends io.grpc.stub.AbstractFutureStub<BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub>
A stub to allow clients to do ListenableFuture-style rpc calls to service BotLiveService. 
Live bot automation service. See file header for scope and design notes.
Permissions:
- READ_BOT_INFO: required for WatchBotEvents, GetBlock, FindBlocks,
                 ListNearbyEntities.
- UPDATE_BOT_CONFIG: required for SendChat, DigBlock, PlaceBlock, UseItem,
                     AttackEntity, InteractEntity, SwingArm, GoTo,
                     StopPathfinding.
Error handling mirrors BotService:
- NOT_FOUND: instance or bot does not exist.
- FAILED_PRECONDITION: bot is not online, target not loaded, or the
                       requested action is not currently valid.
- OUT_OF_RANGE: target is outside the bot's reach / observation radius.
- INTERNAL: unexpected server errors.

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class io.grpc.stub.AbstractStub

    Returns the block at a world position, if the chunk is loaded.
    com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<InteractEntityResponse>

    Right-clicks / interacts with a specific entity by network id.
    com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<ListNearbyEntitiesResponse>

    Lists entities within a radius of the bot, optionally filtered by type.
    com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<PlaceBlockResponse>
    placeBlock(PlaceBlockRequest request)
    Places the currently held item as a block, against a specific face of a specific block.
    com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<SendChatResponse>
    sendChat(SendChatRequest request)
    Sends a chat message (or slash command) from the bot to the connected Minecraft server.
    com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<StopPathfindingResponse>
    stopPathfinding(StopPathfindingRequest request)
    Cancels any in-progress pathfinding session for this bot.
    com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<SwingArmResponse>
    swingArm(SwingArmRequest request)
    Swings the specified arm without a target (visual animation only).
    com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<UseItemResponse>
    useItem(UseItemRequest request)
    Uses the item in the specified hand (eat, drink, throw, draw bow, etc.).

  • Method Details

    • build

      protected BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub build(io.grpc.Channel channel, io.grpc.CallOptions callOptions)
      Specified by:
      build in class io.grpc.stub.AbstractStub<BotLiveServiceGrpc.BotLiveServiceFutureStub>

    • sendChat

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<SendChatResponse> sendChat(SendChatRequest request)
      Sends a chat message (or slash command) from the bot to the connected
Minecraft server. Messages prefixed with "/" are routed as commands.

    • getBlock

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<GetBlockResponse> getBlock(GetBlockRequest request)
      Returns the block at a world position, if the chunk is loaded.

    • findBlocks

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<FindBlocksResponse> findBlocks(FindBlocksRequest request)
      Finds blocks of the given ids within a radius of the bot. Results are
sorted by ascending distance.

    • listNearbyEntities

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<ListNearbyEntitiesResponse> listNearbyEntities(ListNearbyEntitiesRequest request)
      Lists entities within a radius of the bot, optionally filtered by type.

    • digBlock

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<DigBlockResponse> digBlock(DigBlockRequest request)
      Starts (or stops, when `cancel` is set) breaking a block at a specific
position. Unlike MouseClick, the target is explicit — no raytrace from
the current look direction is performed.

    • placeBlock

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<PlaceBlockResponse> placeBlock(PlaceBlockRequest request)
      Places the currently held item as a block, against a specific face of a
specific block.

    • useItem

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<UseItemResponse> useItem(UseItemRequest request)
      Uses the item in the specified hand (eat, drink, throw, draw bow, etc.).

    • attackEntity

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<AttackEntityResponse> attackEntity(AttackEntityRequest request)
      Attacks a specific entity by network id.

    • interactEntity

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<InteractEntityResponse> interactEntity(InteractEntityRequest request)
      Right-clicks / interacts with a specific entity by network id. Used for
trading with villagers, mounting mobs, etc.

    • swingArm

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<SwingArmResponse> swingArm(SwingArmRequest request)
      Swings the specified arm without a target (visual animation only).

    • stopPathfinding

      public com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<StopPathfindingResponse> stopPathfinding(StopPathfindingRequest request)
      Cancels any in-progress pathfinding session for this bot.
